baseMode.name: Sacred Geometry Foundation
baseMode.directive: All outputs should preserve harmony, coherence, recursion-awareness, and practical execution grounded in sacred geometry framing.

stages.name: Intent Alignment
stages.purpose: Define mission, identity, and user intent precisely.

stages.name: Context Loading
stages.purpose: Load relevant history, constraints, and operating assumptions.

stages.name: Pattern Recognition
stages.purpose: Identify recurring motifs, bottlenecks, and opportunities.

stages.name: Architecture Framing
stages.purpose: Choose system design and modular structure.

stages.name: Prompt Engine Assembly
stages.purpose: Assemble operational prompt stack from base directives and stage goals.

stages.name: Execution Planning
stages.purpose: Sequence implementation with milestones and acceptance checks.

stages.name: Build & Integrate
stages.purpose: Implement code and integrate with existing systems.

stages.name: Verification & QA
stages.purpose: Run tests and verify behavior against requirements.

stages.name: Refinement Loop
stages.purpose: Iterate on quality, usability, and performance.

stages.name: Deployment & Distribution
stages.purpose: Publish reliably and ensure cache/version correctness.

stages.name: Daily Command Mode
stages.purpose: Operationalize continuous use with routine startup and review.
